user.title: Cloudflare DDNS
user.description: Enter your Cloudflare API Token and the DNS record to update.

record_type.title: Record Types
record_type.description: Select which record types to update. At least one must be selected.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Cloudflare. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_token: Invalid API Token or insufficient permissions. The token needs Zone:DNS:Edit.
error.zone_not_found: Zone not found. Make sure the zone name matches exactly what is in Cloudflare.
error.select_at_least_one: Select at least one record type (IPv4 or IPv6).
